_meta.source: Office for National Statistics / Office for Budget Responsibility
_meta.methodology: Public sector finances data from ONS. Debt as % GDP uses calendar year GDP estimates. Debt interest from OBR Economic and Fiscal Outlook.

national_debt_pct_gdp.label: National debt
national_debt_pct_gdp.note: Highest sustained level since early 1960s. Excludes Bank of England.

annual_borrowing.label: Annual borrowing (deficit)
annual_borrowing.note: The amount the government borrows each year because spending exceeds tax revenues.

debt_interest.label: Debt interest payments
debt_interest.note: More than the entire schools budget. Driven by high inflation increasing index-linked gilt costs.

total_spending.label: Total government spending
total_spending.note: Total Managed Expenditure. Includes all day-to-day and capital spending.
